changes.description: ProductTile override wrapping base tile with Quick View hover button and modal trigger
QuickViewModal component using ProductView and useProductViewModal for in-PLP product details
Added QUICK_VIEW_TEST_IDS and QUICK_VIEW_EXCLUDED_PRODUCT_TYPES shared constants
Utility functions for quick-view eligibility checks and product type filtering
Jest unit tests for QuickViewModal (spinner, ProductView rendering, aria-label, close behavior)
Playwright E2E tests for quick view button visibility, modal open/close, and product display
Debug E2E test for quick view click behavior diagnostics
Debug E2E test for quick view modal rendering diagnostics
Debug E2E test for quick view selector and DOM structure diagnostics
Fix path resolution using path.resolve() for both relative and absolute APP_ROOT
Feature specification with architecture discoveries, implementation plan, and test cases
Pipeline execution summary with cost analysis and step breakdown
Detailed per-step flight data with agent intents, messages, and tool usage
Aggregated pipeline metrics (steps, duration, files changed, cost)
Playwright E2E test execution log from live-ui validation phase
Terminal output log from pipeline agent sessions
Draft PR block marker from salvage-draft graceful degradation

pipeline.failureReason: Timeout after 1200000ms waiting for session.idle — E2E validation could not complete against deployed storefront
